citations.quote: Rent: £4,686.18 Total Rent (including £500 Advance Rent Payment) £28.23 Per Day
The subsequent monthly sums due will be shown on the rent schedule to be provided separately to the Tenant.
The Landlord acknowledges the Tenant has paid the Advance Payment of FIVE HUNDRED POUNDS (£500) STERLING which will be credited to the Tenant's rent account.

findings.text: Total rent for the tenancy is £4,686.18, including a £500 advance payment, at £28.23 per day.
The agreement states a rent schedule will be provided separately; no schedule is included in this source.
The tenant paid a £500 advance rent payment, credited to the rent account.
No rent schedule or payment records are present in source NAP-SRC-0010. Other matter sources were not provided for this task.

proposed_artifacts.content:
## Source Search Result: Rent Schedule and Payment Records

**Task:** T-NAP-SRC-0010-010
**Source Reviewed:** NAP-SRC-0010 (Student Licence for Miss Anfal Elbushra)

### Findings
- The tenancy agreement (NAP-SRC-0010) states a total rent of £4,686.18, with a £500 advance payment credited.
- Clause 2(a) explicitly states that a separate rent schedule will be provided to the tenant. **No such schedule is included in this source.**
- No payment records, receipts, or arrears statements are present in this source.

### Conclusion
The rent schedule and payment records are not located in source NAP-SRC-0010. A follow-up task is proposed to search other matter sources (e.g., correspondence, financial records, accommodation office records) for these documents.
proposed_artifacts.title: Source Search Result: Rent Schedule and Payment Records

proposed_tasks.instructions: Search all available matter sources (e.g., correspondence, financial records, accommodation office records) for the rent schedule referenced in clause 2(a) of NAP-SRC-0010 and any payment records (receipts, statements, arrears ledger) for Miss Anfal Elbushra. Report any documents found with their source IDs and relevant excerpts.
proposed_tasks.title: Search for rent schedule and payment records in other matter sources

risk_flags.text: The absence of the rent schedule and payment records in this source may hinder verification of arrears calculations.
